mapper.select:
ALTER TABLE ${schema}.${tableName} ADD COLUMN "${colNm}" ${type};
COMMENT ON COLUMN ${schema}."${tableName}"."${colNm}" IS '${colKrNm}';
mapper.update:
ALTER TABLE ${schemNm}."${tblNm}" DROP CONSTRAINT "${tblNm}_pkey";
ALTER TABLE ${schemNm}."${tblNm}" ADD CONSTRAINT "${tblNm}_pkey" PRIMARY KEY (_gid);
